description_long: This lamp features a striking, organic design reminiscent of a branching tree or molecular structure, with numerous thin metal rods radiating outward from a central hub. At the end of each rod, there are small, circular diffusers that likely house individual light sources, creating a constellation-like effect. The lamp is suspended from a single, slender cable, emphasizing its airy and sculptural appearance. The overall structure is open and lightweight, with a delicate interplay of lines and nodes. The finish appears to be a matte or satin metallic, giving it a modern and sophisticated look. This lamp would serve as a dramatic focal point in contemporary urban interiors or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern, sculptural pendant lamp with branching metal rods and multiple circular diffusers, suspended from a single cable. Its airy, organic form and metallic finish make it a striking decorative lighting piece.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full spread of branching rods and circular diffusers, with the central hub and suspension cable clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the depth and three-dimensional arrangement of the rods, revealing more of the lamp's layered structure.
description_view_2: A direct side view, showing the symmetrical distribution of branches and the even spacing of the diffusers around the central axis.
description_view_3: Another angled view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, emphasizing the organic, asymmetrical spread of the branches.
